SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROCHA, ELIZABETH CARMEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER LLC MAXIMUS REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LTD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
